value: ARIS foundational handbook: 1001 first, immutable laws first, governance before execution, verification before success, halls remain separated, and protected identities require legitimacy.

UL is the language of identity, law, and structure. CISIV governs formation lifecycle. CISLR governs runtime enforcement. The law spine is immutable, foundational, and always pre-execution. Speech must follow 0001 -> 1000 -> 1001. Identity cannot be copy-claimed without legitimacy. Containment or explicit degradation is required when law cannot be satisfied.
